paid_credit_api_calls.note: apply_reached/evaluate_reached/adoption_gate_ever_passed/promote_reached are the best-known cumulative state across all triaged runs. data/api_usage_ledger.json records 8 primary-model success records; runs 5 (2026-06-15, ledger record 5) and 6 (2026-06-16T01, ledger record 6) are triaged as evaluate_rejected; run 7 (2026-06-17, ledger record 8) is triaged as promote_push_failed (adoption gate passed, promote reached, final push failed due to push-race). The 7th success record (2026-06-16T06:20:37+00:00) is API/token success only and remains untriaged. Genome was not advanced by run 7. Candidate was not promoted. Runs 5 and 6 historical scores (494.48 and 478.12) were computed under the old formula that included changed_lines; they remain historical records only and are not used as the adoption-gate baseline.

propose_side_hardening.meaning: The Gemini propose prompt now states an explicit baseline-preservation contract: keep all five symbolic indicators (path_traversal_indicator, script_injection_indicator, sqli_indicator, command_delimiter_indicator, encoded_traversal_indicator), keep the full request inspection surface (method, path, query, headers, body), keep the final non-blocking blocked=False fallback return, and make a minimal additive edit that scores strictly above previous_best. Prompt-only/documentation change; no API call, no detector/policy/budget/model/ledger change.

score_schema_migration.new_best_score_meaning: Recomputed for current core/detector.py under the generation-invariant formula (changed_lines excluded). This is a score-schema migration only, not a promotion.
score_schema_migration.runs_5_6_historical_note: Runs 5 and 6 scores (494.48 and 478.12) are historical records under the old formula. They remain classified as evaluate_rejected under their recorded historical gate. The new formula does not retroactively change their classification.
score_schema_migration.run_7_note: Run 7 (2026-06-17, ledger_timestamp=2026-06-17T10:43:08.894275+00:00, github_actions_run_id=27683267711) passed the adoption gate and reached the promote stage, but the final push failed due to a push-race: main had advanced after persist-ledger committed the API usage ledger entry. Candidate was not promoted. Genome was not advanced. Triage classification: promote_push_failed. Workflow push-race hardening handled separately in PR #115. Candidate recovery requires separate Owner-approved PR.
